get.description: Retrieves current KPIs including today's and this week's performance metrics

get.summary: Get notification preferences for an affiliate
get.description: Retrieve the current notification preferences for an affiliate, including email, SMS, and monthly statement preferences. These preferences control which types of notifications the affiliate receives for commission earnings, withdrawals, account status changes, and monthly performance statements.

parameters.name: affiliateId
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the affiliate account

default_preferences.description: Default preferences for a new affiliate

400.description: Bad request - invalid affiliate ID format

403.description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions to access affiliate preferences

429.description: Too many requests - rate limit exceeded

put.summary: Update notification preferences for an affiliate
put.description: Update the notification preferences for an affiliate account. This endpoint allows affiliates to control which types of notifications they receive, including email notifications for commission earnings and withdrawals, SMS alerts for important updates, and monthly performance statement emails. All preference fields are optional in the request body.

parameters.name: affiliateId
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the affiliate account

enable_all.description: Enable email, SMS, and monthly statements

email_only.description: Enable only email notifications, disable SMS

errors.message: Preference 'email' must be a boolean value

403.description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions to update affiliate preferences

429.description: Too many requests - rate limit exceeded

get.summary: Get monthly statement for an affiliate
get.description: Retrieve a detailed monthly performance statement for an affiliate, including commission earnings, withdrawal history, referral statistics, and service-wise breakdown. The statement provides comprehensive insights into affiliate performance for a specific month and year, including transaction details and current wallet balance.

parameters.name: affiliateId
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the affiliate account

successful_statement.description: Example of a complete monthly statement with transactions

empty_statement.description: Example of a statement for a month with no activity

400.description: Bad request - missing or invalid parameters

403.description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions to access affiliate statements

429.description: Too many requests - rate limit exceeded

get.summary: Get available statement months for an affiliate
get.description: Retrieve a list of all available months for which monthly statements can be generated for an affiliate. This endpoint returns months from the affiliate's first commission transaction to the current month, allowing users to know which statements are available for viewing or download.

parameters.name: affiliateId
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the affiliate account

available_months.description: Example showing available months for an active affiliate

no_statements.description: Example for a new affiliate with no commission history

400.description: Bad request - invalid affiliate ID format

403.description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions to access affiliate statements

429.description: Too many requests - rate limit exceeded

post.description: Manually trigger the generation and delivery of a monthly statement for a specific affiliate. This admin-only endpoint allows administrators to resend statements or generate statements for specific months outside of the automated monthly process. The statement will be sent via email if the affiliate has email notifications enabled.

parameters.name: affiliateId
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the affiliate account

current_month.description: Generate and send statement for the current month

previous_month.description: Resend statement for a previous month

400.description: Bad request - missing or invalid parameters

429.description: Too many requests - rate limit exceeded

post.summary: Send monthly statements to all affiliates (admin only)
post.description: Bulk operation to generate and send monthly statements to all active affiliates for a specified month and year. This admin-only endpoint is typically used for automated monthly statement distribution or to resend statements for a specific period. The operation processes all active affiliates and returns a summary of successful and failed deliveries.

monthly_batch.description: Generate and send statements for all active affiliates for a specific month

year_end_batch.description: Send December statements for year-end processing

successful_batch.description: Most statements sent successfully with few failures

errors.error: Email delivery failed: invalid email address
Statement generation failed: no commission data

400.description: Bad request - missing or invalid parameters

value.message: Admin access required for bulk operations

429.description: Too many requests - rate limit exceeded for bulk operations
